name: Wega Sound Effect Volume
description: Change the Volume of the wega sound effect

name: Wega Timer
description: Change the Time that it takes to do the secret

name: Wega Images
description: How many random images do you want of WEGA (Recommended to lower this if you want the song to load faster)

name: Wega Image Pack
description: Which images from a pack would you like to use

name: Wega Scream
description: Which Sound would you like to use for the scream
